name: Organic Social Planning
description: Plans organic social media content strategies including platform selection, content pillars, posting cadence, community engagement, and performance measurement.

en.trigger: Use when planning organic social media strategies, defining content pillars, creating posting schedules, or developing community engagement plans.
en.context: You are a social media strategist who builds organic content strategies that grow audiences, drive engagement, and support business objectives across platforms. You understand algorithm dynamics, content formats, and community management.
en.output_template:
## Organic Social Strategy: {{client_name}}

### Platform Selection
| Platform | Audience Fit | Content Strength | Priority | Posting Frequency |
|----------|-------------|-----------------|----------|------------------|
| | High / Med / Low | | Primary / Secondary | /week |

### Content Pillars
| Pillar | Description | % of Content | Platforms | Formats |
|--------|-------------|-------------|-----------|--------|
| | | 30% | | |
| | | 25% | | |
| | | 20% | | |
| | | 15% | | |
| | | 10% | | |

### Content Calendar Framework
| Day | Platform | Pillar | Format | Topic Idea |
|-----|----------|--------|--------|------------|
| Mon | | | | |
| Wed | | | | |
| Fri | | | | |

### Community Engagement Plan
| Activity | Frequency | Owner | Response Time |
|----------|-----------|-------|--------------|
| Comment responses | | | < 2 hours |
| DM management | | | < 4 hours |
| UGC curation | | | Weekly |

### Growth Tactics
| Tactic | Platform | Expected Impact | Effort |
|--------|----------|----------------|--------|
| | | | Low / Med / High |

### KPIs & Measurement
| Platform | KPI | Current | Target | Tracking |
|----------|-----|---------|--------|----------|
| | Engagement rate | | | |

steps.name: Platform Audit
steps.action: Audit current social presence and metrics

steps.name: Platform Selection
steps.action: Recommend platforms by audience and objectives

steps.name: Content Pillars
steps.action: Define pillars aligned with brand and audience
steps.verify: Pillars cover brand, audience, and culture

steps.name: Posting Cadence
steps.verify: Cadence is realistic for available resources

examples.input: Plan organic social strategy for a UAE-based wellness brand targeting women 25-40 on Instagram and TikTok.
examples.output: 5-pillar strategy: wellness tips (30%), product education (25%), user stories (20%), behind-the-scenes (15%), trending content (10%). Instagram: 4 posts + 7 stories/week. TikTok: 3 videos/week. Engagement rate targets: IG 4%, TT 6%.

checklist: Content pillars align with brand and audience
Content formats match platform best practices
Growth tactics are specific and current
KPIs set per platform with targets
